thesis: WaterBridge Infrastructure operates a scaled Delaware Basin produced-water network (~2,500 pipeline miles, long-term fee contracts with dedications and MVCs). **[Fact]** Q1 2026 adjusted EBITDA was $102.9M on ~2.5M bbl/d; 2026 guidance is $425M–$465M EBITDA on $430M–$490M growth capex. **[Fact]** March 2026 net debt is ~$1.42B across 123.456M economic units (Class A plus OpCo). Component proofs value the existing network at ~$36/sh enterprise value less debt and execution reserves, with a separate contracted-growth option.
why_market_wrong: The market may extrapolate post-IPO combination growth or dismiss the franchise because of sponsor overhang and heavy 2026 capex. **[Inference]** At $34.46, price sits above the $26.51 base component value, implying successful execution of Speedway/Devon cohorts and rapid deleveraging that filings have not yet proven cohort-by-cohort.

key_assumptions.source: ~$180M maintenance equity cash / 123.456M units; 2026 growth capex excluded

open_questions: Project-level cohort ROIC for Speedway, Devon, and mature network segments.
Contracted vs merchant EBITDA split and renewal economics by customer.
Actual covenant headroom and 2026–2033 sources-and-uses under stress.
Maintenance capex verification vs ~25% of growth capex estimate.
